title: Nush: A Unix-Style Shell with Trie-Based Autocompletion
name: project-shell-team0000
description: A fully functional Unix-style shell built in C, supporting command execution, piping, I/O redirection, and signal handling. Features a custom trie data structure powering tab-completion for commands and file paths, with hands-on application of OS concepts including process management, file descriptors, and system calls.

title: Automated Leukemia Detection via Deep Learning
name: Hicks_final
description: Trained and compared three CNN architectures — Custom CNN, ResNet, and EfficientNet — on approximately 170,000 stained bone marrow cell images from the Munich Leukemia Laboratory dataset across 945 patients. ResNet achieved the strongest results with 88.7% accuracy and 95.4% recall. Applied transfer learning, Stratified K-Fold Cross-Validation, Hyperband hyperparameter tuning, and class weighting to address severe class imbalance. Written up as a full research paper in IEEE format.

title: MyMovieList
name: MyMovieList
description: A Java application for tracking and managing personal movie libraries, demonstrating object-oriented design principles with clean class architecture and separation of concerns. Implements features for adding, organizing, and updating movie entries.
